title: Bitcoin Price Prediction: Peter Brandt Says Bitcoin Could Hit $300K–$500K by 2029
description: Most people who bought Bitcoin (CRYPTO: BTC) in the last year are currently underwater and the mood around the market is cautious. The Bitcoin price is hovering above $80,000 today, but BTC is still down 36% from its $126K all-time high. Despite the OG crypto’s price action, veteran trader Peter Brandt has made an ambitious ... Bitcoin Price Prediction: Peter Brandt Says Bitcoin Could Hit $300K–$500K by 2029
